name: Sudokolorful
short_description: When Sudoku meets Pixel Art. Play with colors (7 palettes, including colorblind friendly). The game has Progressive and Classic Mode. Progressive Mode has 50 themed challenges with 4 variations each. Classic mode has 90 challenges. Both modes have 4x4, 6x6 and 9x9. Display number and notes available
detailed_description:
Sudokolorful is a color-based puzzle game, suitable for color blindness, based on the classic Sudoku game.
Your main objective is to fill every empty spot with a color, being careful to not repeat colors in the same line, column and neighborhood (bigger squares).



  • Challenge your brain with different types of Sudoku: 4x4, 6x6 and 9x9
  • Progressive mode with 50 unique challenges and 4 variations each.
  • Choose between three difficulties: easy, medium and hard on Classic mode. Up to 90 challenges available in this mode.
  • Color blindness? Change to Colorblind Friendly palette. Color palette carefully thought for every type of color blindness but Achromatopsia
  • Save your current game anytime
  • Do you prefer the classic Sudoku? Turn the numbers on

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese
